name: aaptjs3
description: Node.js wrapper for Android Asset Packaging Tool (aapt), bundled with prebuilt binaries for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

scripts.test: node -e "const aapt = require('./'); aapt.getApkInfo('./test/test.apk').then(r => { console.log('PASS:', JSON.stringify(r)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error('FAIL:', e.message); process.exit(1); });"

author: kiliaosi
